result:
`make` in `wpa_supplicant/` passes cleanly (exit 0). Summary:

- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now declared as `int os_get_time(struct os_time *t, int clock_source);`
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`: definition updated to accept `clock_source` (unused — behavior unchanged, matching "0 and reserved values treated the same").
- Updated all 28 call sites across the repo (`src/ap/`, `src/crypto/`, `src/eap_peer/`, `src/eap_server/`, `src/eapol_auth/`, `src/pae/`, `src/radius/`, `src/tls/`, `src/utils/`, `src/wps/`, `wpa_supplicant/notify.c`) to pass `0`.
- Left `os_win32.c`, `os_internal.c`, `os_none.c` untouched — they're alternate platform backends not compiled into this build (confirmed via `wpa_supplicant/Makefile.real`), and the task scoped the definition change to `os_unix.c`.
